/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Helper.dir/Helper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Helper.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Helper.dir/test_Demo.cpp.o -o Helper -F/Users/hola/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/hola/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib /Users/hola/Qt/6.11.0/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
